heading: Log Retention
body:
Atlas retains logs for 10 days, after which they are deleted.

If you require logs older than 10 days, you can automatically
[forward logs](triggers-forward-logs) to another service. You
can also download a dump of currently available logs from the UI or use
the [Admin API Logging endpoints](atlas/app-services/admin/api/v3) to
fetch logs before they expire.
